meaning: 鏃ョ珛[鏃ユ湰鏈窞宀涗笢宀告腐甯俔
examples: I started my blog as a practitioner at Hitachi.

Panasonic, Sony and Hitachi announced more than 2, 000 redundancies at plants in south Wales in 2000.
